subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto the Beloved of the world, Who, at this hour when the setting sun is manifest, hath caused the effulgences of light to appear [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد محبوب عالم را که در این حین که هنگام غروب آفتاب ظاهر است تجلیات انوار
subcodes.subjects: @limits of language, @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @prayer for protection, @love of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
